# loom/binding/c/BUILD.bazel                                                   #
#                                                                              #
# Add CMake-only content below the preserve marker at the end of this file.    #
#                                                                              #
# To disable autogeneration for this file entirely, delete this header.        #
################################################################################

set(IREE_PACKAGE_ROOT_DIR "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}")
set(IREE_PACKAGE_ROOT_PREFIX "loom/binding/c")

iree_add_all_subdirs()

loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    loomc
  HDRS
    "include/loomc/artifact.h"
    "include/loomc/artifact_manifest.h"
    "include/loomc/base.h"
    "include/loomc/compile.h"
    "include/loomc/compile_report.h"
    "include/loomc/config.h"
    "include/loomc/context.h"
    "include/loomc/diagnostic.h"
    "include/loomc/emit.h"
    "include/loomc/iree.h"
    "include/loomc/launch_config.h"
    "include/loomc/link.h"
    "include/loomc/link_index.h"
    "include/loomc/loomc.h"
    "include/loomc/module.h"
    "include/loomc/pass.h"
    "include/loomc/result.h"
    "include/loomc/sanitizer.h"
    "include/loomc/source.h"
    "include/loomc/status.h"
    "include/loomc/target.h"
    "include/loomc/workspace.h"
    "src/config.h"
    "src/context.h"
    "src/diagnostic.h"
    "src/link_index.h"
    "src/module.h"
    "src/option_chain.h"
    "src/pass_program.h"
    "src/result.h"
    "src/source.h"
    "src/target.h"
    "src/visibility.h"
    "src/workspace.h"
  SRCS
    "src/artifact.c"
    "src/artifact_manifest.c"
    "src/base.c"
    "src/base_system.c"
    "src/compile.c"
    "src/compile_report.c"
    "src/config.c"
    "src/context.c"
    "src/diagnostic.c"
    "src/emit.c"
    "src/launch_config.c"
    "src/link.c"
    "src/link_index.c"
    "src/module.c"
    "src/module_function.c"
    "src/module_global.c"
    "src/option_chain.c"
    "src/pass_program.c"
    "src/result.c"
    "src/source.c"
    "src/status.c"
    "src/target.c"
    "src/workspace.c"
  DEPS
    iree::base
    iree::base::internal
    iree::base::internal::arena
    iree::io::file_handle
    iree::io::stream
    loom::analysis::kernel_launch_config
    loom::codegen::low::pipeline::pass_environment
    loom::codegen::low::target_binding
    loom::codegen::low::text_asm
    loom::error::diagnostic
    loom::error::error_defs
    loom::error::renderer
    loom::format::bytecode::format
    loom::format::bytecode::reader
    loom::format::bytecode::writer
    loom::format::text::parser
    loom::format::text::printer
    loom::ir
    loom::link::linker
    loom::link::module_index
    loom::link::planner
    loom::ops::func
    loom::ops::global
    loom::ops::kernel
    loom::ops::low
    loom::ops::op_defs
    loom::ops::op_registry
    loom::ops::pass
    loom::pass::builtin_registry
    loom::pass::environment
    loom::pass::interpreter
    loom::pass::program
    loom::pass::registry
    loom::pass::tooling
    loom::sanitizer::options
    loom::target::artifact_manifest
    loom::target::compile_report
    loom::target::compile_report_format
    loom::target::pipeline
    loom::target::predicate
    loom::target::provider
    loom::target::types
    loom::tooling::config
    loom::util::json
    loom::util::stream
    loom::verify
  INCLUDES
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/.>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/include>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/src>"
  PUBLIC
)

if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV AND LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_VULKAN)
loom_cc_library(
  NAME
    loomc_full
  HDRS
    "include/loomc/artifact.h"
    "include/loomc/artifact_manifest.h"
    "include/loomc/base.h"
    "include/loomc/compile.h"
    "include/loomc/compile_report.h"
    "include/loomc/config.h"
    "include/loomc/context.h"
    "include/loomc/diagnostic.h"
    "include/loomc/emit.h"
    "include/loomc/iree.h"
    "include/loomc/launch_config.h"
    "include/loomc/link.h"
    "include/loomc/link_index.h"
    "include/loomc/loomc.h"
    "include/loomc/module.h"
    "include/loomc/pass.h"
    "include/loomc/result.h"
    "include/loomc/sanitizer.h"
    "include/loomc/source.h"
    "include/loomc/status.h"
    "include/loomc/target.h"
    "include/loomc/target/iree_hal.h"
    "include/loomc/target/spirv.h"
    "include/loomc/target/spirv/base.h"
    "include/loomc/target/spirv/emit.h"
    "include/loomc/target/spirv/iree_hal.h"
    "include/loomc/target/spirv/profile.h"
    "include/loomc/target/spirv/vulkan.h"
    "include/loomc/target/spirv/vulkaninfo.h"
    "include/loomc/workspace.h"
  DEPS
    ::loomc
    loom::binding::c::target::iree_hal
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv::iree_hal
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv::vulkan
    loom::binding::c::target::spirv::vulkaninfo
  INCLUDES
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/.>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/.>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>"
    "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/include>"
  PUBLIC
)
endif()

### BAZEL_TO_CMAKE_PRESERVES_ALL_CONTENT_BELOW_THIS_LINE ###

include(CMakePackageConfigHelpers)
include(GNUInstallDirs)

set(LOOMC_VERSION "0.1.0" CACHE STRING "Loom C API package version.")
if(NOT LOOMC_VERSION MATCHES "^([0-9]+)\\.([0-9]+)\\.([0-9]+)$")
  message(FATAL_ERROR
    "LOOMC_VERSION must be a semantic version of the form MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH")
endif()
set(LOOMC_VERSION_MAJOR "${CMAKE_MATCH_1}")
set(LOOMC_VERSION_MINOR "${CMAKE_MATCH_2}")
set(LOOMC_VERSION_PATCH "${CMAKE_MATCH_3}")

set(_loomc_cmake_package_dir "${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}/cmake/loomc")
set(_loomc_build_package_dir "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/cmake/loomc")

function(_loomc_add_shared_component target_name)
  if(NOT TARGET "${target_name}")
    message(FATAL_ERROR
      "loomc shared package expected enabled binding target: ${target_name}")
  endif()
  if(NOT TARGET "${target_name}.objects")
    message(FATAL_ERROR
      "loomc shared package expected object target: ${target_name}.objects")
  endif()
  list(APPEND _loomc_component_targets "${target_name}")
  list(APPEND _loomc_object_sources "$<TARGET_OBJECTS:${target_name}.objects>")
  list(APPEND _loomc_object_targets "${target_name}.objects")
  set(_loomc_component_targets "${_loomc_component_targets}" PARENT_SCOPE)
  set(_loomc_object_sources "${_loomc_object_sources}" PARENT_SCOPE)
  set(_loomc_object_targets "${_loomc_object_targets}" PARENT_SCOPE)
endfunction()

function(_loomc_collect_shared_component_deps target_name)
  get_target_property(_link_libraries "${target_name}" LINK_LIBRARIES)
  get_target_property(
    _interface_link_libraries "${target_name}" INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES)
  foreach(_dep IN LISTS _link_libraries _interface_link_libraries)
    if(NOT _dep OR _dep MATCHES "^\\$<TARGET_OBJECTS:")
      continue()
    endif()
    if(TARGET "${_dep}")
      get_target_property(_aliased_target "${_dep}" ALIASED_TARGET)
      if(_aliased_target)
        set(_dep_target "${_aliased_target}")
      else()
        set(_dep_target "${_dep}")
      endif()
      if(_dep_target IN_LIST _loomc_component_targets)
        continue()
      endif()
    endif()
    list(APPEND _loomc_direct_deps "${_dep}")
  endforeach()
  set(_loomc_direct_deps "${_loomc_direct_deps}" PARENT_SCOPE)
endfunction()

if(NOT TARGET loom_binding_c_loomc)
  message(FATAL_ERROR "loomc shared package requires loom_binding_c_loomc")
endif()

set(_loomc_component_targets)
set(_loomc_object_sources)
set(_loomc_object_targets)
_loomc_add_shared_component(loom_binding_c_loomc)
_loomc_add_shared_component(loom_binding_c_target_iree_hal_iree_hal)
if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_LLVMIR AND LOOM_EMIT_LLVMIR)
  _loomc_add_shared_component(loom_binding_c_target_llvmir_llvmir)
endif()
if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_SPIRV AND LOOM_EMIT_SPIRV)
  _loomc_add_shared_component(loom_binding_c_target_spirv_spirv)
  _loomc_add_shared_component(loom_binding_c_target_spirv_vulkaninfo_vulkaninfo)
  if(IREE_HAL_DRIVER_VULKAN)
    _loomc_add_shared_component(loom_binding_c_target_spirv_iree_hal_iree_hal)
  endif()
  if(LOOM_EXECUTE_IREE_HAL AND IREE_HAL_DRIVER_VULKAN)
    _loomc_add_shared_component(loom_binding_c_target_spirv_vulkan_vulkan)
  endif()
endif()
if(LOOM_TARGET_ARCH_AMDGPU AND LOOM_EMIT_AMDGPU)
  _loomc_add_shared_component(loom_binding_c_target_amdgpu_amdgpu)
endif()

foreach(_loomc_object_target IN LISTS _loomc_object_targets)
  target_compile_definitions("${_loomc_object_target}" PRIVATE
    LOOMC_BUILDING_SHARED_LIBRARY)
endforeach()

# Link the shared library from the selected public binding objects directly.
# Their immediate non-selected deps provide the ordinary link libraries; selected
# components are skipped to avoid ALWAYSLINK interface deps re-adding objects.
set(_loomc_direct_deps)
foreach(_loomc_component_target IN LISTS _loomc_component_targets)
  _loomc_collect_shared_component_deps("${_loomc_component_target}")
endforeach()
if(_loomc_direct_deps)
  list(REMOVE_DUPLICATES _loomc_direct_deps)
endif()

add_library(loomc_shared SHARED ${_loomc_object_sources})
target_link_libraries(loomc_shared PRIVATE ${_loomc_direct_deps})
target_include_directories(loomc_shared PUBLIC
  "$<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>"
  "$<INSTALL_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}>")
target_compile_definitions(loomc_shared INTERFACE
  LOOMC_USING_SHARED_LIBRARY)
set_target_properties(loomc_shared PROPERTIES
  OUTPUT_NAME loomc
  EXPORT_NAME loomc
  VERSION ${LOOMC_VERSION}
  SOVERSION ${LOOMC_VERSION_MAJOR}
  POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON
  LINKER_LANGUAGE CXX
  INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES "")
if(NOT WIN32)
  set_target_properties(loomc_shared PROPERTIES
    C_VISIBILITY_PRESET hidden
    CXX_VISIBILITY_PRESET hidden
    VISIBILITY_INLINES_HIDDEN ON
    LINK_FLAGS "-Wl,--version-script=${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake/loomc_exports.lds")
endif()

if(NOT TARGET loomc::loomc)
  add_library(loomc::loomc ALIAS loomc_shared)
endif()

install(TARGETS loomc_shared EXPORT loomc-targets
  LIBRARY DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}"
    COMPONENT "${HRX_PUBLIC_DIST_COMPONENT}"
    NAMELINK_COMPONENT "${HRX_PUBLIC_DIST_COMPONENT}"
  ARCHIVE DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}"
    COMPONENT "${HRX_PUBLIC_DIST_COMPONENT}"
  RUNTIME DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_BINDIR}"
    COMPONENT "${HRX_PUBLIC_DIST_COMPONENT}"
  INCLUDES DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}")
install(DIRECTORY include/loomc
  DESTINATION "${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}"
  COMPONENT "${HRX_PUBLIC_DIST_COMPONENT}"
  FILES_MATCHING PATTERN "*.h")
install(EXPORT loomc-targets
  NAMESPACE loomc::
  DESTINATION "${_loomc_cmake_package_dir}"
  COMPONENT "${HRX_PUBLIC_DIST_COMPONENT}")

configure_package_config_file(
  cmake/loomc-config.cmake.in
  "${_loomc_build_package_dir}/loomc-config.cmake"
  INSTALL_DESTINATION "${_loomc_cmake_package_dir}")
write_basic_package_version_file(
  "${_loomc_build_package_dir}/loomc-config-version.cmake"
  VERSION "${LOOMC_VERSION}"
  COMPATIBILITY SameMajorVersion)
export(EXPORT loomc-targets
  NAMESPACE loomc::
  FILE "${_loomc_build_package_dir}/loomc-targets.cmake")

install(FILES
  "${_loomc_build_package_dir}/loomc-config.cmake"
  "${_loomc_build_package_dir}/loomc-config-version.cmake"
  DESTINATION "${_loomc_cmake_package_dir}"
  COMPONENT "${HRX_PUBLIC_DIST_COMPONENT}")
